content.problemStatement:
Kiteretsu goes to his Chemistry Lab to perform the perfect reaction.
In his lab, he found NNN reagents numbered 111 to NNN. The ithi^{th}ith reagent has two properties - AiA_iAi‚Äč and BiB_iBi‚Äč.

A reaction can be performed between the reagents iii and jjj **only if** Ai‚Č§jA_i \leq jAi‚Äč‚Č§j.

If a reaction is performed between reagents iii and jjj, i‚čÖji \cdot ji‚čÖj amount of heat is produced. Out of this, D‚čÖ(Bi‚äēBj)D \cdot (B_i \oplus B_j)D‚čÖ(Bi‚Äč‚äēBj‚Äč) is absorbed and the rest heat is released. Here, ‚äē\oplus‚äē denotes the bitwise XOR operation.

More formally, in a reaction between reagents iii and jjj, the heat released is given by:


H(i,j)=i‚čÖj‚ąíD‚čÖ(Bi‚äēBj)H(i,j)= i \cdot j - D \cdot (B_i \oplus B_j)H(i,j)=i‚čÖj‚ąíD‚čÖ(Bi‚Äč‚äēBj‚Äč)
Find the **maximum** possible heat which can be released in a reaction.

**Note**: The input of this problem is large, so use fast input/output methods.


Input Format

The first line will contain TTT - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
First line of each test case contains two integers N,DN, DN,D.
Second line of each test case contains NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
Third line of each test case contains NNN integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line, a single integer denoting the maximum possible heat that can be released in a reaction.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: Let us choose i=2i = 2i=2 and j=4j = 4j=4. Since A2‚Č§4A_2 \leq 4A2‚Äč‚Č§4, a reaction can take place.
The heat released in this reaction is 2‚čÖ4‚ąí2‚čÖ(3‚äē2)=8‚ąí2‚čÖ1=62\cdot 4 - 2\cdot (3 \oplus 2) = 8-2 \cdot 1 = 62‚čÖ4‚ąí2‚čÖ(3‚äē2)=8‚ąí2‚čÖ1=6. It can be proven that for no other reaction, the heat released is greater than 666.
Some other reactions can take place between (2,5)(2, 5)(2,5), (3,5)(3,5)(3,5). Note that no reaction is possible between (3,4)(3,4)(3,4) as A3‚Čį4A_3 \nleq 4A3‚Äč‚Čį4.
Test Case 222: The only possible reaction is between reagents 111 and 222. The heat released in this reaction is 1‚čÖ2‚ąí3‚čÖ(1‚äē2)=2‚ąí3‚čÖ3=‚ąí71 \cdot 2 - 3\cdot (1 \oplus 2) = 2 - 3\cdot 3 = -71‚čÖ2‚ąí3‚čÖ(1‚äē2)=2‚ąí3‚čÖ3=‚ąí7.
